Title: Empty cart shows 'Cart is empty' message
Preconditions: User has not added any items
Expected_Result: Page shows 'Cart is empty!' message and a link 'Click here to buy products'. No table or items are rendered.

Title: Add single product from Products page
Steps: 1. Hover over any product card  2. Click 'Add to cart' overlay  3. In modal click 'View Cart'
Expected_Result: Cart page shows 1 row with product name 'Blue Top' quantity 1 price as displayed on product card and total = price * 1.

Title: Add same product twice increments quantity
Steps: 1. Return to '/products'  2. Add 'Blue Top' again  3. Click 'View Cart'
Expected_Result: Cart still shows 1 row for 'Blue Top' but quantity is now 2 and total = price * 2.

Title: Add different products as separate rows
Steps: 1. Add 'Blue Top'  2. Add 'Men Tshirt'  3. View cart
Expected_Result: Cart shows 2 separate rows one per product each with quantity 1 and its own price.

Title: Remove product from cart
Steps: 1. Open '/view_cart'  2. Click the 'X' (delete) icon on a row
Expected_Result: The row is removed. If it was the last item the empty cart message appears. Cart total updates correctly.

Title: Add to cart from product detail page
Preconditions: User is on a product detail page
Steps: 1. Set quantity to 3  2. Click 'Add to cart'  3. Click 'View Cart' in modal
Expected_Result: Cart shows the product with quantity = 3 and total = price * 3.

Title: Cart total is sum of all line totals
Steps: 1. View cart  2. Compute expected total from displayed prices and quantities
Expected_Result: Each line shows correct subtotal. Cart does not show overall total summary on this page (Automation Exercise design) — verified at checkout. Subtotals must match price × qty exactly.

Title: Cart persists across page navigation
Steps: 1. Navigate to '/products'  2. Navigate to '/contact_us'  3. Click 'Cart' in header
Expected_Result: Cart still contains the same product with the same quantity.

Title: Cart persists after logout / login
Preconditions: Logged-in user has items in cart
Steps: 1. Click Logout  2. Log back in with same account  3. Open cart
Expected_Result: Cart retains all items from before logout. Quantities and selections are preserved.
Notes: Known risk area on demo sites

Title: Add to cart while logged out then login preserves cart
Preconditions: Guest user has items in cart
Steps: 1. As guest add a product  2. Log in with existing account  3. Open cart
Expected_Result: Guest cart is merged with account cart. No items are lost.

Title: 'Proceed to checkout' goes to address page when logged in
Preconditions: Logged-in user has items in cart
Expected_Result: User is taken to Address Details / Review Your Order page showing delivery and billing address.

Title: 'Proceed to checkout' as guest prompts login/register
Preconditions: Guest user has items in cart
Expected_Result: Modal appears with message 'Register / Login your account to proceed on checkout' and a link to register/login.

Title: Cart icon counter in header reflects item count
Steps: 1. Add 3 different products  2. Look at 'Cart' link in header
Expected_Result: Cart link displays count = 3 (or is otherwise visibly distinguishable from empty state).
Notes: Verify whether AE actually shows a counter — may be skipped if not implemented
